svg.title: simplicio-loop infographic
svg.desc: A detailed workflow infographic showing the simplicio-loop core plus loop flow from invocation through delivery, evidence, safety gates, and watcher re-feed.

g.text: Core + loop: one command to drain work with evidence
attach proof to the work item
A promise is accepted only with current receipts.
completion requires evidence in the same turn
destructive or irreversible ops stop for review
unsafe diffs are blocked before push
max iterations, STOP file, and watcher gate
stall detector changes strategy before spinning
Standalone install: no mandatory runtime dependency for the skill bundle
